data_quality_caveat.admission_interpretation: Legacy/offline post_metadata is missing; runtime source discovery remains usable because it relies on source text, FTS, and embeddings.

recommended_manifest_caveat: accepted as AI product management / AI product strategy / corporate R&D and AI prototyping expert; legacy/offline post_metadata is missing but runtime FTS/embedding retrieval is unaffected; overlap-heavy with product/adoption and coding-agent cells, avoid routing for deep ML engineering, infra, or senior software-engineering model comparison
risks: No valid legacy/offline post_metadata in current DB snapshot; runtime FTS/embedding retrieval is unaffected.
Heavy overlap with existing product/adoption and AI-coding experts.
Some educational, promotional, personal, or off-topic content should be filtered during retrieval.
Not a deep ML or infrastructure expert.
final_advice: Accept as an AI product management and corporate R&D product-strategy source, with strict routing caveats; missing legacy post_metadata is not a runtime retrieval limitation.
